title: Fix admin authorization error in Admin Panel

requirements.text: Fix the 'Unauthorized: Only admins can perform this action' error that appears in the Admin Panel when logged-in admin users attempt to upload site images (logo, cover/hero image) or save social links (WhatsApp number, Instagram URL). The backend must correctly recognize the session established by the client-side adminAuth utilities and allow these mutations to proceed without returning an authorization error.

quotes: Unauthorized: Only admins can perform this action

acceptanceCriteria: After logging in with valid admin credentials (DeepakKumawat / Kinnu*0613), uploading a logo image in the Site Images tab succeeds without showing the unauthorized error.
After logging in with valid admin credentials, uploading a cover/hero image succeeds without showing the unauthorized error.
After logging in with valid admin credentials, saving social links (WhatsApp number and Instagram URL) succeeds without showing the unauthorized error.
The unauthorized error banner does not appear in the Admin Panel for any action performed by a correctly authenticated admin session.
Unauthenticated or non-admin users still receive the unauthorized error when attempting admin actions.

constraints: Do not change the admin credentials (username: DeepakKumawat, password: Kinnu*0613).
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all Motoko logic in the single backend/main.mo actor.
nonGoals: Adding new admin features beyond fixing the authorization error.
Changing the visual design or layout of the Admin Panel.
